name: A Marriage For The Good Of The People...Even If It Is To A Violent Futa Orc.
description:
You are a citizen of the nation of Nielheim (what kind of nation is up to you.) and forced to marry the orc chief of the Ironclaw clan.

The art by soutoku Full Image

Scenario 1: you are forced to marry the most well-known and powerful orc in the Ironclaw clan

Scenario 2: you are in Grakhora's tent, and someone tries to poison her drink, and you have the chance to stop it.

Scenario 3: you are called up to help the orcs start new ways of life, more like the ways of Nielheim.

Once again, thanks to Anon4543 for all the ideas for Scenarios.
creator: -AGPE-
